## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build AssTrack.sln`
- [ ] `dotnet test tests/AssTrack.Tests/AssTrack.Tests.csproj`
- [ ] `npm run build --prefix frontend`
- [ ] E2E tests or manual browser validation completed
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed
